_source_note: SYNTHETIC SAMPLE DATA for demo/testing only. In production this file is replaced by a live feed or scheduled ingest from the Meteorological Services Department (MSD) and the Department of Civil Protection. Do not treat these as real forecasts or warnings.

records.message_en: Below-normal rainfall expected over the next 10 days. Consider delaying planting of late maize varieties.
records.message_sn: Kunotarisirwa mvura shoma munguva inouya yemazuva gumi. Fungai kunonotsa kudyara chibage chinononoka kuibva.
records.message_nd: Izulu elincane lilindelekile ezinsukwini ezilishumi ezizayo. Cabangela ukuphuza ukuhlanyela umbila ophuzayo.

records.message_en: Heavy rainfall expected in the next 48 hours. Households near rivers and low-lying areas should move valuables and livestock to higher ground.
records.message_sn: Mvura huru inotarisirwa mumaawa makumi mana nemasere anouya. Vagari vari pedyo nenzizi ngavatamise midziyo nemombe kunzvimbo dzakakwirira.
records.message_nd: Izulu elikhulu lilindelekile emahoreni angama-48 azayo. Imizi eseduze lemifula kufanele ithuthele impahla lezifuyo ezindaweni eziphakemeyo.
records.source: Department of Civil Protection Flood Bulletin (sample)

records.message_en: Normal to below-normal rainfall is forecast for the remainder of the season. Farmers are advised to prioritise drought-tolerant small grains where possible.
records.message_sn: Mvura inotarisirwa kuve yakajairika kusvika pasi penormal kusvikira mwaka wapera. Varimi vanokurudzirwa kuronga zviyo zvinoshinga kushaikwa kwemvura pavanogona.
records.message_nd: Izulu elilindelekile kusukela ngokujwayelekileyo kusiya ngaphansi kokujwayelekileyo kuze kuphele isikhathi. Abalimi bayacetshiswa ukuqala ngamabele akhula kalula endaweni ezomileyo lapho kungenzeka khona.

records.message_en: No active weather warnings for this area. Normal planting conditions expected this week.
records.message_sn: Hapana yambiro yemamiriro ekunze parizvino munzvimbo ino. Mamiriro akajairika ekudyara anotarisirwa vhiki rino.
records.message_nd: Akula isexwayiso esisebenzayo sesimo sezulu kulesisigaba. Izimo ezijwayelekileyo zokuhlanyela zilindelekile kulelisonto.
